title: FDIC Plans to Block Stablecoins From Pass-Through Insurance
message_html: FDIC Plans to Block Stablecoins From Pass-Through Insurance ...
snippet: The Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FDIC) plans to propose rules saying that stablecoins are not eligible for FDIC pass-through insurance, and that tokenized deposits are eligible for such insurance. FDIC Chairman Travis Hill said this on Wednesday (March 11) in a speech delivered at the Amer
